meta.title: Bark TTS Generation
meta.description: Generate expressive text-to-speech audio using Suno Bark

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger Bark TTS via webhook. Expected JSON: { text, voice_preset?, output_format?, api_key? } or header X-API-Key. Set BARK_API_KEY env var to enable authentication.

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: Validate inputs: text length, voice preset whitelist, format

nodes.name: Bark TTS Request

body.raw: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Check Valid').item.json.text, voice_preset: $('Check Valid').item.json.voice_preset, output_format: $('Check Valid').item.json.output_format }) }}

nodes.notes: Call Bark TTS API to generate speech

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, format: $json.format, sample_rate: $json.sample_rate, audio_base64_length: ($json.audio_base64 || '').length }) }}

nodes.name: Save Audio
nodes.notes: Decode base64 and save audio file to disk

nodes.name: Discord Notification

parameters.text: ={{ 'Bark TTS complete! File: ' + $('Save Audio').item.json.filename + ' Size: ' + Math.round($('Save Audio').item.json.size_bytes / 1024) + 'KB' }}

nodes.notes: Send Discord notification with file info
